note: Experiment ledger (growth-impl.md §7.2). Seeded from real commits shipped before the loop existed; their windowed baselines are null and get backfilled from GSC (~16mo) / Bing history in P1 (else scored pre/post + flagged low-confidence). control_scope is null for these (full rollouts, no held-back cohort). Future experiments SHOULD carry a control_scope for difference-in-differences.

experiments.title: Markdown → Image (PNG) feature + 9-locale SEO cluster
experiments.hypothesis: A new md→image feature + its localized 转png/转图片/长图 cluster earns impressions on image-conversion intents Bing/CJK skews toward.

experiments.title: CJK 转word/转epub Bing-demand tuning + RelatedTools + FAQ
experiments.hypothesis: Retuned titles/keywords for Bing phrasings (markdown转word在线工具, 转epub) plus RelatedTools + FAQPage schema on the zh 转word/转epub pages improves their Bing position.

experiments.title: Word cluster: RelatedTools + FAQPage on all 9 pages + dynamic sitemap + reciprocal hreflang
experiments.hypothesis: Completing RelatedTools + FAQPage schema across all 9 word pages, plus fresh-lastmod dynamic sitemap and reciprocal hreflang, lifts impressions for the word (DOCX) cluster.

target_scope.note: Fixed 2026-07-16: the 6 non-EN targets were seeded without their locale prefixes (e.g. /markdown-ke-word → /id/markdown-ke-word), so experiment-lock never matched them and they leaked into the opportunity slate. Corrected to the real published URLs (cross-checked against tool-links.ts / app routes).

experiments.title: og:image on 72 intent pages + RelatedTools (24) + EPUB FAQPage (9)
experiments.hypothesis: Adding a real social card to 72 pages + RelatedTools internal links + EPUB FAQ schema improves social CTR and internal-link equity; ranking position should hold (guardrail).

target_scope.note: representative subset of the 72; broaden when GSC page data flows

experiments.title: Server-side <html lang> per locale
experiments.hypothesis: Rendering the correct <html lang> server-side (not just client-side) improves indexing/impressions on non-EN locale pages for JS-light crawlers, esp. Bing (our #1 channel).

experiments.title: Rewrite /markdown-to-word title + meta for CTR (formatting-fidelity hook)
experiments.hypothesis: Surfacing the real Word-conversion anxiety — tables/formatting stay intact — plus the privacy edge in the title/meta lifts Bing CTR from 0.82% (pos 8.6) without losing position.
experiments.note: DiD vs /readme-to-pdf (untouched control) — removes site-wide shocks; parallel-trends assumed between two EN SEO pages. Bing only (GSC impressions too thin here). VERDICT ONLY VALID ONCE MERGED + DEPLOYED — the title/meta must be live for CTR to move.

experiments.title: Rewrite /obsidian-markdown-to-pdf title + meta for CTR (no-plugins hook)
experiments.hypothesis: Leading the snippet with the Obsidian export pain (no plugins to install) + formatting-fidelity + free/private lifts Bing CTR from 1.95% (low for pos 5.96) without losing position.
experiments.note: DiD vs /claude-artifacts-to-pdf (untouched, high-volume Bing control — 316 impr → low-variance trend estimate; different CTR level is fine for DiD, which compares deltas). Parallel-trends caveat: control is a Bing 'star', watch its own trajectory. Bing only (page thin/absent on GSC). VERDICT ONLY VALID ONCE MERGED + DEPLOYED.

experiments.title: New pages: /markdown-converter hub + /markdown-to-html spoke
experiments.hypothesis: The converter-family queries (markdown converter/+online/+free, convert markdown to html) have ZERO ranking presence (2026-07-16 demand-gap report) while the SERP is small exact-match tool sites, not authorities — a multi-format hub with an honest conversion matrix + the missing html spoke (feature existed, page didn't) earns impressions, Bing first.

baseline.note: New URLs — true zero baseline (no impressions possible before the pages exist).

experiments.note: New-page pattern (like md-to-png-cluster): control_scope null, baseline 0. SERP recon 2026-07-16: top 'free' multi-format hub (markdownconverter.pro) actually requires signup + credit packs — our information gain is honest breadth (6 formats incl. EPUB/image nobody in the SERP has) + genuinely-free. Internal links from /markdown-to-pdf-online-free + /markdown-to-docx only (TOOL_LINKS footer slot deliberately DEFERRED until in-flight experiments measure ~2026-08-12, to avoid touching locked pages). STAMP commit AFTER deploy. VERDICT ONLY VALID ONCE MERGED + DEPLOYED.

experiments.title: Instrumented CTAs on both comparison pages (EN converter-first, zh PNG-first)
experiments.hypothesis: The EN comparison page is surging on Google (impressions 322→562 in 4 days, 78% of Jul 10-17 pv from google.com) and the zh page's traffic is 7/8 CN + 100% referrer-less (AI chats / WeChat webviews), but the pages had only inline text links (EN) or a single untracked button (zh) — prominent instrumented CTAs (EN → converter; zh → PNG 长图 first, since WeChat webviews break file downloads) convert listicle readers into converter users.

baseline.note: New instrumentation — comparison_cta_click cannot exist before this ships (adoption-style baseline, like new-page experiments).

experiments.note: First experiment on the NEW events/cta_clicks metric (measure.mjs pathOf-normalized scopes + events.mjs comparison_cta_click byPath — both shipped with this change). Auto-verdict measures adoption only; at measure time ALSO compute CTA-CTR manually = cta_clicks / vercel pageviews per page (cross-channel guardrails unsupported), and check conv funnel didn't regress. Content deliberately untouched (EN page surging — additive CTA blocks only; title changes remain human-declined). Locks both comparison pages. STAMP commit AFTER deploy. VERDICT ONLY VALID ONCE DEPLOYED. ITERATION C (2026-07-16, human-approved from mockup): InlineConverter embedded after the Markdown Free section on BOTH pages — drop-zone + the real ExportRow (full reuse: conversions, errors, funnel events). comparison_cta_click gains position=inline (fires on file LOAD = engagement); on-page conversions now attribute to these pages via convert_success requestPath. Treatment = top/bottom CTAs + inline converter combined; position prop separates blocks at analysis time.
